---
title: "7 · Hazard integration"
---

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple"}
**Scope.** The downstream handoff: delivering the dynamic hydrological state to landslide (LandLab
Factor-of-Safety), liquefaction (Sanger GLM, via Vs30 + NEHRP site-class probability), and flood
antecedent-state models — on the shared grid, with per-cell uncertainty.
:::

*Content migrating from the "Digital-Twin MVP", the "Downstream: LandLab coupling", and the
Vs30 site-class-probability sections.*

## The digital-twin MVP

## LandLab landslide coupling (dynamic export)

## Liquefaction: Vs30 → NEHRP site-class probability

## Flood antecedent state
